description.value: Price 250 gp; Slot none; CL 5th; Weight â; Aura faint transmutation DESCRIPTION This light gray elixir makes the user’s voice fiercer and louder, and gives it an inhuman quality that rattles those he talks to, granting the user a +10 competence bonus on Intimidate checks for 1 hour.
